reviews.name: 후****
reviews.content: 파티 필수품... 난리치는 초 없이도 귀여운 케이크 뚝딱이에요! 이름 써주는 것도 있어서 다음번엔 우리 후추 생일케이크에도 꽂아주려구요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: A party essential... such a cute cake topper without needing those crazy candles! Since they can write names on them too, I'm planning to use it for our Huchu's birthday cake next time hehe

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 곧 강아지들 생일이라 구매해 봤어요~토퍼 형태라 깔끔하고 보관도 얇아서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for my dogs' upcoming birthday! The topper design is clean and nice, and it's easy to store since it's thin

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content_en: The character is so cute hehe

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 와르르 다 꽂아도 예쁜데 몇개만 꽂아주는것도 귀여워용 ㅎㅎ 핑크곤듀라 생일축하해로 골랐어요! 생축픽은 아껴둿다 다음에 쓰면 될듯... 월간바잇미 마니마니 만들어주세요 졸귀탱 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It looks pretty even with all of them stuck in, but just using a few is cute too hehe I picked the pink Gondola birthday one! I'm saving the birthday pick for next time... please keep making BITE ME monthly editions, they're adorable ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
제 생일날 정맣 잘썼어요.친구들도 어디서 샀냐고 물어봤어요.
일회용이라 다소 아쉬워요
reviews.content_en: I used it perfectly on my birthday. My friends even asked where I bought it. It's a bit disappointing that it's disposable

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
귀여워서 눈여겨보잇엇어요
초는 ㅇ위험할거같아서 요거하몀 좋을거같아요
reviews.content_en: I've had my eye on it because it's so cute. Candles seem dangerous so this would be perfect instead

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
강아지 첫생일파티 할때 잘 썼어요🍰
귀엽습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Used it well for my pup's first birthday party 🍰 It's adorable hehe

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 뷔페갔는데 따로 케이크 하긴 넘 배부르고.. 요 귀연 토퍼로 생일 분위기 잘 냈어요 ~~!! 갯수 많아서 몇번이고 쓸수 있을거같아요
reviews.content_en: We went to a buffet and didn't want to do a whole separate cake since we were too full.. this cute topper set the birthday mood really well!! Since there are so many, I think we can use it multiple times

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content_en: Ordered it for my birthday. It's cute

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
아가 생일은 7월이지만 이것저것 필요한 제품들 구매하며 귀여워서 미리 구매한다 하고 같이 구매했어요
잘 보관해뒀다가 내년에 아가 생일날 잘쓸께요
reviews.content_en: My baby's birthday is in July, but while shopping for various things we needed, I bought this early too because it was so cute. I'll save it carefully and use it well for my baby's birthday next year
